ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contraceptive_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contraceptive method */,
  "method_value" INTEGER /* Numeric value representing the method */,
  "method_label" TEXT /* Label describing the contraceptive method */,
  "next_module" TEXT /* Reference to the next module for follow-up questions or actions */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the method belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contraceptive_methods_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES method_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contraceptive method */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the method usage */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the method usage */,
  "weighted_percentage" REAL /* Weighted percentage of the method usage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_usage_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES contraceptive_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_usage_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the user is located */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the user */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the user */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contraceptive method preferred */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES contraceptive_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record associated with the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., dataset, report, document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was uploaded */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the resource belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
